items.name: Stealth the Chameleon
items.description: stealth is an expert in the martial arts and the art of jutsu. he is, as his name implies, extreamly stealthy. and quite handy with a shuriken. he is good friends with atomic and the gang. he is pretty calm most of the time.he also can walk on walls and ceilings, cuz hes a chameleon. he also can turn invisible. he is also pretty good at hacking into technology. and, he knows about sum hidden caves where he gets alot of jewels and diamonds and stuff, so u can say hes a treasure hunter. in conclusion, hes a pretty kool ninja.
